title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Staff Nurse Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. Allotted various vacancies for Staff Nurse Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc Nursing, GNM, can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
